title: The Seven Souls
description: based on undertale, where there are 7 souls you can craft
body:
Sevenfold Souls — lightweight passives that change how you play

A compact Minecraft mod that adds 7 collectible “Souls”, each granting a distinct, always-on passive. No keybind spam, no skill trees—just pick the soul that fits your playstyle and go. By default you can equip one soul at a time (configurable), making your choice meaningful.

How it works

Find or craft a Soul Core, then fuse it with themed shards to create a Soul.

Equip it (trinket/curio slot if present, otherwise as a bauble item).

Passives are constant; most have a tiny drawback for balance.

Death rules are configurable: drop on death, keep on death, or bind a soul with Soul Thread so it stays with you.
